notes: Level 4 manual review override shard for spell indexes 0-19 in generated discovery row order.

arcane-eye::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The detector matched Bonus Action wording, but Arcane Eye does not modify attacks, saves, or checks.
arcane-eye::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Track the eye movement under sustained/granted action and sensory-scouting fields.
arcane-eye::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed for this bucket by adding a granted Bonus Action movement entry.

arcane-eye::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: The caster can move the eye up to 30 feet as a Bonus Action; runtime now has a granted Bonus Action entry and spatial details already carry the movement distance and 1-inch opening allowance.
arcane-eye::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedTemplateChange: No new sustain-action field required for this pass.
arcane-eye::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by runtime grantedActions plus existing spatialDetails.

arcane-eye::movement_or_repositioning.issue: The eye hovers, moves independently, is blocked by solid barriers, and can pass through 1-inch openings; runtime now has action and measured details but no first-class movable sensor/entity model.
arcane-eye::movement_or_repositioning.recommendedTemplateChange: Add remote sensor/entity movement fields for hover, independent movement, barrier blocking, and minimum opening size.
arcane-eye::movement_or_repositioning.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime remoteSensor movement data instead of relying on grantedActions and spatial notes.

arcane-eye::vision_light_sound.issue: The caster mentally receives visual information from the eye, which sees in every direction and has 30-foot Darkvision; runtime preserves this in utility prose and measured details but not typed sensory fields.
arcane-eye::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add remote sensory fields for visual feed, omnidirectional sight, and Darkvision range.

arcane-eye::status_or_state_change.issue: The created eye is Invisible and invulnerable, but runtime has no typed created sensor/object state for invisibility or invulnerability.
arcane-eye::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add remote sensor/object state fields for Invisible, invulnerable, hover, and duration.

aura-of-life::healing_or_restoration.issue: A nonhostile living creature regains 1 Hit Point when it starts its turn in the aura with 0 Hit Points; runtime now has a typed HEALING effect.
aura-of-life::healing_or_restoration.recommendedTemplateChange: No new healing field required for this pass.
aura-of-life::healing_or_restoration.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding a turn-start HEALING effect for 1 Hit Point.

aura-of-life::object_stats_or_damageabil.issue: The detector matched Hit Point wording, but this is creature healing and Hit Point maximum protection rather than object stats or damageability.
aura-of-life::object_stats_or_damageabil.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under healing and defensive/prevention fields.
aura-of-life::object_stats_or_damageabil.recommendedJsonChange: Track under HEALING and DEFENSIVE/utility data.

aura-of-life::damage_reduction_or_preven.issue: Necrotic resistance is now typed, but preventing Hit Point maximum reduction is still only described in utility prose.
aura-of-life::damage_reduction_or_preven.recommendedTemplateChange: Add defensive prevention fields for immunity to Hit Point maximum reduction.
aura-of-life::damage_reduction_or_preven.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime defense/prevention data for Hit Point maximum reduction immunity.
aura-of-life::damage_reduction_or_preven.reviewerNote: Closed by adding Prevention Immunities -> effects[].preventionImmunity[] and a DEFENSIVE immunity effect with hit_point_maximum_reduction.

aura-of-life::conditional_ending.issue: The aura moving with the caster until the spell ends is already captured by areaFollowsCaster and normal duration/concentration.
aura-of-life::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by existing areaOfEffect.followsCaster and duration/concentration.

aura-of-purity::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The aura grants Advantage on saving throws against effects that cause specific conditions; runtime now has a defensive advantage effect, but it cannot type the condition-causing filter.
aura-of-purity::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add save-advantage filter fields keyed to caused conditions.
aura-of-purity::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime saveAdvantage filters for effects causing Blinded, Charmed, Deafened, Frightened, Paralyzed, Poisoned, or Stunned.

aura-of-purity::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched Blinded/Deafened condition names, but the spell does not create light, vision, or sound area mechanics.
aura-of-purity::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under save-advantage and condition-prevention fields.

aura-of-purity::social_or_knowledge_effe.issue: The detector matched Charmed/Frightened condition names, but the spell is protective and does not create a social or knowledge effect.
aura-of-purity::social_or_knowledge_effe.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under save-advantage and condition-prevention fields.

aura-of-purity::status_or_state_change.issue: Creatures in the aura can't become diseased, but runtime has no typed disease-prevention or condition-prevention field.
aura-of-purity::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add prevention fields for disease immunity and condition-causing effect filters.
aura-of-purity::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime prevention data for disease and condition-causing effects.

aura-of-purity::damage_reduction_or_prev.issue: Poison damage resistance is now typed as a DEFENSIVE effect.
aura-of-purity::damage_reduction_or_prev.recommendedTemplateChange: No new poison resistance field required for this pass.
aura-of-purity::damage_reduction_or_prev.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding a DEFENSIVE resistance effect for Poison damage.

aura-of-purity::conditional_ending.issue: The aura moving with the caster until the spell ends is already captured by areaFollowsCaster and normal duration/concentration.
aura-of-purity::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by existing areaOfEffect.followsCaster and duration/concentration.

banishment::choice_or_mode.issue: If an extraplanar target does not return, it is transported to a random location on a plane chosen by the DM and associated with its creature type; this destination choice is prose-only.
banishment::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add planar destination choice fields for random location, DM-chosen plane, and creature-type association.

banishment::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Charisma save that negates the banishment is already typed in runtime status effects.
banishment::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by existing Charisma save with negates_condition.

banishment::target_filter_or_eligibility.issue: The detector matched the return destination sentence, but this is destination placement after banishment rather than target eligibility.
banishment::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedJsonChange: No target-filter data required for this sentence.

banishment::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched ordinary line-of-sight targeting, which is already represented by Line of Sight true.

banishment::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: Targets are transported to a harmless demiplane, may reappear at the original or nearest unoccupied space, and certain creature types can be sent permanently to an associated plane; runtime only stores Banished/Incapacitated statuses.
banishment::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Add planar transport fields for temporary demiplane, return placement, permanent non-return, creature-type filter, and associated-plane destination.

banishment::status_or_state_change.issue: The target has Incapacitated while banished; runtime has typed Incapacitated and Banished statuses, and fake repeat/escape saves were removed.
banishment::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No new status field required for this pass.
banishment::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by existing STATUS_CONDITION effects after removing fake escape/repeat data.

banishment::conditional_ending.issue: Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, and Fiend targets do not return if the spell lasts for 1 minute; runtime has no typed duration-completion branch by creature type.
banishment::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional ending fields for no-return-on-full-duration with creature-type filters.
banishment::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding data for full-duration extraplanar banishment.

banishment::aftermath_or_memory.issue: When the spell ends, the target reappears in its original space or nearest unoccupied space, unless the creature-type full-duration branch prevents return; runtime lacks return placement.
banishment::aftermath_or_memory.recommendedTemplateChange: Add post-spell return placement fields for original space and nearest unoccupied fallback.

blight::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Constitution save for half Necrotic damage is already typed in structured markdown and runtime JSON.
blight::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No attack/save modifier field required for the standard creature damage branch.
blight::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by existing DAMAGE effect with Constitution save and saveEffect half.

blight::target_filter_or_eligibility.issue: Blight's Plant-creature automatic failure rule is now encoded as a save auto-outcome override.
blight::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedTemplateChange: Closed by Save Auto Outcome auto_failure with condition is_plant_creature.
blight::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by runtime condition.saveOutcomeOverrides carrying is_plant_creature -> auto_failure.

blight::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched ordinary line-of-sight targeting, which is already represented by Line of Sight true.

blight::environmental_change.issue: A nonmagical plant that is not a creature withers and dies without a save; runtime now preserves this as utility prose but not as typed plant/environment state.
blight::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime plantObjectEffect data for nonmagical plant withering and death.

charm-monster::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Wisdom save and the Advantage condition when the caster or allies are fighting the target are now typed in runtime saveModifiers.
charm-monster::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No new save modifier field required for this pass.
charm-monster::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding an advantage saveModifier and removing fake repeat/escape data.

charm-monster::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched ordinary line-of-sight targeting, which is already represented by Line of Sight true.

charm-monster::social_or_knowledge_effec.issue: The Charmed creature is Friendly to the caster and later knows it was Charmed; runtime has Charmed but not Friendly attitude or post-spell awareness as typed social/memory data.
charm-monster::social_or_knowledge_effec.recommendedTemplateChange: Add social attitude and post-effect awareness fields for charm spells.
charm-monster::social_or_knowledge_effec.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime attitudeChange and postEffectAwareness data.

charm-monster::status_or_state_change.issue: Charmed is typed, but the Friendly attitude rider and damage-by-caster-or-allies ending condition are not first-class status metadata.
charm-monster::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add status rider fields for attitude and break-on-damage source filters.
charm-monster::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime status rider data for Friendly and breakOnDamageFrom caster/allies.

charm-monster::conditional_ending.issue: The Charmed condition ends early if the caster or the caster's allies damage the target; runtime no longer has fake repeat saves but still lacks break-on-damage source filters.
charm-monster::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional ending fields for break on damage from caster or allies.
charm-monster::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding data for breakOnDamageFrom caster/allies.
charm-monster::conditional_ending.closedReason: Reused the existing caster_or_ally_damages_target conditional-ending trigger in the structured spell fields and runtime conditionalEndings entry, scoped to the affected Charmed effect.

charm-monster::aftermath_or_memory.issue: When the spell ends, the target knows it was Charmed by the caster; runtime lacks post-spell awareness/memory data.
charm-monster::aftermath_or_memory.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath/memory fields for target awareness after enchantments.

compulsion::choice_or_mode.issue: Each creature of the caster's choice can be affected, but runtime maxTargets remains 1 and cannot represent arbitrary chosen creatures in range.
compulsion::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add chosen-creatures target count fields for any-number/multi target spells.
compulsion::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime target count semantics for each creature of choice within range.

compulsion::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The detector matched the Wisdom save and Bonus Action wording; the save is typed, and the movement rider is now represented as MOVEMENT rather than an attack/save modifier.
compulsion::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by existing Wisdom save plus added MOVEMENT effect.

compulsion::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched ordinary line-of-sight targeting, which is already represented by Line of Sight true.

compulsion::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: The detector matched Charmed and forced movement, but there is no separate social attitude or knowledge mechanic beyond the typed Charmed condition and MOVEMENT rider.
compulsion::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedTemplateChange: No social/knowledge field required for this spell.
compulsion::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by STATUS_CONDITION and MOVEMENT effects.

compulsion::status_or_state_change.closedReason: Compulsion now uses Repeat Save Timing after_forced_movement in structured markdown and runtime repeatSave data, so the Charmed target's save happens after resolving the compelled movement rather than at a generic turn end.
compulsion::status_or_state_change.issue: Charmed is typed, and forced movement is now typed, but the repeat save occurs after moving in the compelled way rather than at generic turn end.
compulsion::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add repeat-save timing fields for after compelled movement/action resolution.
compulsion::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime repeatSave timing for after_forced_movement.

compulsion::conditional_ending.closedReason: Compulsion now records the post-movement repeat Wisdom save with successEnds true, so the per-target ending on a successful save is explicit without a separate conditionalEndings entry.
compulsion::conditional_ending.issue: A target repeats the save after moving in the compelled way, ending the spell on itself on success; current runtime can only approximate this with repeatSave timing.
compulsion::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add per-target ending fields tied to after-movement repeat saves.
compulsion::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding/repeatSave timing for after compelled movement.

confusion::choice_or_mode.issue: Affected targets must roll 1d10 at the start of each turn and consult a behavior table; runtime only stores a generic Confused condition.
confusion::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add random behavior table fields for die, timing, and result rows.
confusion::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime randomBehaviorTable data for Confusion.

confusion::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Wisdom save that negates Confusion is already typed in runtime JSON.
confusion::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No attack/save modifier field required for the initial save.
confusion::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by existing Wisdom save with negates_condition.

confusion::reaction_or_opportunity_restr.issue: Affected targets can't take Bonus Actions or Reactions, but runtime has no typed action-lockout fields on the Confused condition.
confusion::reaction_or_opportunity_restr.recommendedTemplateChange: Add action restriction fields for no Bonus Actions and no Reactions.
confusion::reaction_or_opportunity_restr.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime actionRestrictions data to Confused.

confusion::repeat_save_or_recurring_chec.closedReason: Confusion now records the start-turn 1d10 behavior roll as structured Recurring Mechanics and runtime recurringMechanics data, while its end-turn Wisdom repeat save remains typed.
confusion::repeat_save_or_recurring_chec.issue: The end-turn repeat save is typed, but the start-turn 1d10 recurring behavior roll and behavior table are missing.
confusion::repeat_save_or_recurring_chec.recommendedTemplateChange: Add recurring random-roll behavior fields alongside repeat save fields.

conjure-minor-elementals::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster chooses Acid, Cold, Fire, or Lightning when making each attack; runtime stores the damage types as a combined string and does not type per-attack damage-type choice.
conjure-minor-elementals::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add per-hit damage type choice fields.
conjure-minor-elementals::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime damageTypeChoice data for Acid/Cold/Fire/Lightning chosen on each attack.

conjure-minor-elementals::terrain_or_sur.issue: The ground in the Emanation is Difficult Terrain for enemies; runtime now has a TERRAIN effect for difficult terrain.
conjure-minor-elementals::terrain_or_sur.recommendedTemplateChange: No new terrain field required for this pass.
conjure-minor-elementals::terrain_or_sur.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding a TERRAIN difficult effect, with enemy-only filtering still called out under environmental targeting if needed later.

conjure-minor-elementals::summon_or_cont.issue: The spell conjures spirits from the Elemental Planes that flit around the caster, but runtime models only the damage and terrain outputs, not the spirit aura entity.
conjure-minor-elementals::summon_or_cont.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aura-spirit manifestation fields for non-commanded conjured spirits.
conjure-minor-elementals::summon_or_cont.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime auraManifestation data for Elemental spirits.

conjure-minor-elementals::travel_or_plan.issue: The mention of Elemental Planes identifies the spirits' origin but does not move a target between planes.
conjure-minor-elementals::travel_or_plan.recommendedJsonChange: No runtime planar movement data required.

conjure-minor-elementals::environmental_.issue: Enemy-only Difficult Terrain and per-attack elemental damage type choice are partly typed, but runtime lacks enemy-only terrain filtering and per-hit choice semantics.
conjure-minor-elementals::environmental_.recommendedTemplateChange: Add enemy-only area effect filters and per-hit choice fields.
conjure-minor-elementals::environmental_.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrain target filters and damageTypeChoice data.

conjure-minor-elementals::conditional_en.issue: The extra damage lasts until the normal spell duration ends; there is no special conditional ending.

conjure-woodland-beings::attack_or_save_.issue: The damage save can trigger when the Emanation enters a creature's space, when a creature enters it, or when a creature ends its turn there, and only once per turn; runtime has a single damage effect and cannot express all trigger paths.
conjure-woodland-beings::attack_or_save_.recommendedTemplateChange: Add moving-area collision triggers, enter/end-turn triggers, optional force-save permission, and once-per-turn target gating.
conjure-woodland-beings::attack_or_save_.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime areaDamageTriggers data for emanation movement, creature entry, end-turn, caster choice, and once-per-turn.

conjure-woodland-beings::sustain_or_reca.issue: The caster can take Disengage as a Bonus Action for the spell's duration; runtime now has a granted Bonus Action Disengage utility effect.
conjure-woodland-beings::sustain_or_reca.recommendedTemplateChange: No new sustain-action field required for this pass.
conjure-woodland-beings::sustain_or_reca.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding a grantedActions Bonus Action Disengage entry.

conjure-woodland-beings::vision_light_so.issue: The detector matched creatures the caster can see for damage-trigger eligibility; this is visibility filtering, not a light, vision, or sound area mechanic.
conjure-woodland-beings::vision_light_so.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under area trigger target filters if needed.

conjure-woodland-beings::summon_or_contr.issue: The spell conjures nature spirits that flit around the caster, but runtime models the damage and Disengage outputs rather than the spirit aura manifestation.
conjure-woodland-beings::summon_or_contr.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aura-spirit manifestation fields for non-commanded conjured spirits.
conjure-woodland-beings::summon_or_contr.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime auraManifestation data for nature spirits.

control-water::choice_or_mode.issue: Control Water has four named effect modes and lets the caster repeat the same effect or choose a different one as a later Magic action; runtime has only a generic control description and no typed option list.
control-water::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental control option fields for Flood, Part Water, Redirect Flow, and Whirlpool, including repeat/change action semantics.
control-water::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime controlOptions/grantedActions data for the four water-control modes.

control-water::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Whirlpool mode forces a Strength saving throw on enter/end-turn, with damage and restraint-like escape movement rules, but runtime has no typed Whirlpool damage/save effect.
control-water::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add option-scoped save/damage fields for environmental control modes.

control-water::forced_movement.issue: Whirlpool pulls creatures in water within 25 feet 10 feet toward it, and swimming away requires an action plus Strength (Athletics) check; runtime has no typed pull or escape check for this mode.
control-water::forced_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental forced movement fields for pull distance, radius, medium requirement, and escape action/check.
control-water::forced_movement.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime Whirlpool forcedMovement and escapeCheck data.

control-water::terrain_or_surface.issue: Part Water creates a trench and water walls, Redirect Flow changes water flow over obstacles and walls, and water returns to normal after leaving the area; runtime has none of these surface/flow states typed.
control-water::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add water terrain/state fields for trench, water walls, redirected flow, obstacle traversal, and flow normalization outside the area.

control-water::created_object_or_structu.issue: Flood can create a 20-foot wave, Part Water creates a trench and side walls, and Whirlpool creates a shaped whirlpool with base/top width and height; runtime lacks typed created water-structure geometry.
control-water::created_object_or_structu.recommendedTemplateChange: Add mode-scoped created water structure fields for wave, trench/walls, and whirlpool geometry.

control-water::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: Whirlpool effects trigger when creatures are within 25 feet, enter for the first time on a turn, or end their turn there; runtime has no typed environmental trigger gating.

control-water::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: The wave travels across the area, but it is environmental water movement rather than creature travel or planar movement.
control-water::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under environmental water structure/movement fields.

control-water::resource_or_consumption.issue: The detector matched repeated water-control wording, but Control Water does not consume a resource or tracked quantity.

control-water::environmental_change.issue: Every Control Water mode changes water state, flow, level, or shape; runtime only contains a generic control description.
control-water::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add comprehensive water-control environmental state fields for mode-specific effects.
control-water::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalControl modes for Flood, Part Water, Redirect Flow, and Whirlpool.

control-water::conditional_ending.issue: Each active mode lasts until the spell ends or the caster chooses a different effect, and Part Water then fills back over the next round; runtime lacks mode replacement and restoration timing.
control-water::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add mode-duration/replacement fields and restoration-after-mode fields.
control-water::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime modeDuration and restorationTiming data.

death-ward::object_stats_or_damageabilit.issue: The detector matched Hit Points wording, but Death Ward protects a creature from dropping to 0 HP or instant death rather than describing object stats or damageability.

death-ward::conditional_ending.closureReason: Added Death Ward deathPrevention runtime data, explicit spell-ending conditional triggers, structured markdown fields, and template/schema support for once-before-duration death prevention.
death-ward::conditional_ending.issue: The spell ends the first time it converts a drop to 0 HP into 1 HP, or negates an instant-kill effect without damage; runtime stores this only as utility prose.
death-ward::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add defensive trigger/consumption fields for once-before-duration death prevention and instant-kill negation.
death-ward::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime deathPrevention data with triggers drop_to_0_hp and instant_death_no_damage.

dimension-door::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched destination options involving seeing, visualizing, or describing a location; these are teleport destination selection rules, not a vision/light/sound effect.

dimension-door::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: The detector matched quoted destination examples, but Dimension Door has no ward/alarm/trigger mechanic.
dimension-door::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedTemplateChange: Track destination selection under teleport fields.

dimension-door::travel_or_planar_movemen.issue: The caster teleports to a seen, visualized, or described location within 500 feet, can bring one willing creature within 5 feet, places that creature within 5 feet of the destination, and takes 4d6 Force damage with the passenger if the destination is occupied or filled; runtime stores this as utility prose only.
dimension-door::travel_or_planar_movemen.recommendedTemplateChange: Add teleport fields for destination selection modes, optional willing passenger, passenger origin/destination distance, occupied-space failure, and failure damage.
dimension-door::travel_or_planar_movemen.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime teleport data for Dimension Door.

divination::summon_or_controlled_entity.issue: The spell contacts a god or servants but does not summon or control an entity into the scene.
divination::summon_or_controlled_entity.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under information/contact fields, not summon fields.

divination::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: The caster asks one question about a goal, event, or activity within 7 days; the DM gives a truthful phrase or cryptic rhyme; repeated castings before a Long Rest have cumulative 25 percent no-answer chance. Runtime stores this as prose only.
divination::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedTemplateChange: Add divination/information fields for question count, lookahead window, truthful reply, reply form, changed-circumstance caveat, repeat-before-rest chance, and cumulative chance step.

dominate-beast::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Wisdom save, Beast target filter, Advantage if fighting, and on-damage repeat save are now typed in runtime JSON.
dominate-beast::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No new attack/save modifier field required for this pass.
dominate-beast::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding Beast filters, save Advantage modifier, and on_damage repeat save timing.

dominate-beast::reaction_or_opportunity_.issue: The caster can command the Charmed Beast to take a Reaction, but must spend the caster's own Reaction; runtime lacks command reaction economy.
dominate-beast::reaction_or_opportunity_.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled-target reaction command fields with caster reaction cost.

dominate-beast::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched ordinary line-of-sight targeting, which is already represented by Line of Sight true.

dominate-beast::message_or_communication.issue: The caster has a telepathic link with the Charmed Beast while both are on the same plane; runtime lacks typed telepathic communication data.
dominate-beast::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Add telepathic link fields for target status requirement and same-plane requirement.

dominate-beast::summon_or_controlled_ent.issue: The caster can issue no-action commands that the target obeys on its turn, including attack, movement, and object fetching, with fallback self-protection behavior; runtime only has Charmed.
dominate-beast::summon_or_controlled_ent.recommendedTemplateChange: Add dominated-target command fields for no-action commands, obedience, examples, idle behavior, and reaction command cost.

dominate-beast::travel_or_planar_movemen.issue: The same-plane wording limits telepathic link range but does not move a creature between planes.

dominate-beast::social_or_knowledge_effe.issue: The Charmed state is typed, but domination command obedience and telepathic command semantics are not modeled as social/control mechanics.
dominate-beast::social_or_knowledge_effe.recommendedTemplateChange: Add dominated attitude/control fields distinct from generic Charmed.

dominate-beast::status_or_state_change.issue: Charmed is typed, but the status carries special domination riders: command obedience, same-plane telepathic link, self-protection fallback, and on-damage repeat save.
dominate-beast::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add status rider fields for domination-specific control behavior.
dominate-beast::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime status rider data for domination.

elemental-bane::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster chooses Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder, and the chosen type controls both the first-per-turn extra damage and resistance loss; runtime only preserves the choice in utility prose.
elemental-bane::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked damage-type choice fields that feed damage rider and resistance-removal effects.

elemental-bane::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The target must fail a Constitution save before the duration effects apply; runtime still stores this as utility prose rather than a typed save-gated ongoing effect.
elemental-bane::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add save-gated ongoing debuff fields for effects that are not standard conditions.
elemental-bane::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime save-gated Elemental Bane effect data.

elemental-bane::repeat_save_or_recurring.closedReason: Elemental Bane now records the first-per-turn chosen-type rider damage as structured Recurring Mechanics and runtime recurringMechanics data.
elemental-bane::repeat_save_or_recurring.issue: The first time each turn the affected target takes damage of the chosen type, it takes 2d6 extra damage of that type; runtime lacks first-per-turn damage trigger semantics.
elemental-bane::repeat_save_or_recurring.recommendedTemplateChange: Add first-per-turn damage-received trigger fields keyed by chosen damage type.
elemental-bane::repeat_save_or_recurring.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime damageTakenTrigger data with frequency first_per_turn.

elemental-bane::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched ordinary line-of-sight targeting, which is already represented by Line of Sight true.

elemental-bane::damage_reduction_or_prev.issue: The affected target loses resistance to the chosen damage type until the spell ends; runtime lacks typed resistance-removal or resistance-suppression data.
elemental-bane::damage_reduction_or_prev.recommendedTemplateChange: Add defensive override fields for suppressing resistance to a chosen damage type.
elemental-bane::damage_reduction_or_prev.reviewerNote: Closed by adding Resistance Suppression Damage Types and Resistance Suppression Damage Type Source to the structured template, plus effects[].resistanceSuppression.damageType[] and damageTypeSource in runtime JSON. Elemental Bane now records the eligible Acid/Cold/Fire/Lightning/Thunder set with chosen_damage_type source.

elemental-bane::environmental_change.issue: The detector matched elemental damage type names, but the spell changes a target's damage interaction rather than the environment.
elemental-bane::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under damage type choice and resistance suppression fields.

elemental-bane::conditional_ending.issue: Resistance suppression lasts until the normal spell duration ends; there is no special conditional ending.

evards-black-tentacles::attack_or_save_m.issue: The Strength save can occur on initial cast, enter-area, or end-turn, with once-per-turn gating; runtime has damage/status saves but not all trigger paths or once-per-turn gating.
evards-black-tentacles::attack_or_save_m.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area damage/status trigger fields for initial, enter-area, end-turn, and once-per-turn gating.
evards-black-tentacles::attack_or_save_m.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime areaTrigger data for tentacles.

evards-black-tentacles::terrain_or_surfa.issue: The tentacles turn the 20-foot square into Difficult Terrain; runtime now has a TERRAIN difficult effect.
evards-black-tentacles::terrain_or_surfa.recommendedTemplateChange: No new terrain field required for this pass.
evards-black-tentacles::terrain_or_surfa.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding a TERRAIN difficult effect.

evards-black-tentacles::vision_light_sou.issue: The detector matched ordinary line-of-sight targeting to ground the caster can see.

evards-black-tentacles::status_or_state_.issue: Restrained is typed, and the previous fake repeat save was replaced with the canonical Strength (Athletics) action escape check against spell save DC.
evards-black-tentacles::status_or_state_.recommendedTemplateChange: No new status field required for this pass.

evards-black-tentacles::environmental_ch.issue: The environmental ground change is Difficult Terrain and is now typed as a TERRAIN effect.
evards-black-tentacles::environmental_ch.recommendedTemplateChange: No new environmental field required for this pass.
evards-black-tentacles::environmental_ch.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by added TERRAIN difficult effect.

evards-black-tentacles::conditional_endi.issue: The Restrained condition lasts until the spell ends unless the creature succeeds on the canonical action escape check; no separate conditional-ending bucket is needed beyond the corrected status escape data.
evards-black-tentacles::conditional_endi.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by corrected statusCondition.escapeCheck and duration.

fabricate::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster chooses visible raw materials and converts them into products of the same material, with size/material limits and proficiency limits; runtime stores this as prose only.
fabricate::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add fabrication fields for raw material selection, material continuity, sufficient quantity, size limits by material class, quality inheritance, and proficiency-gated products.

fabricate::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched visible raw materials, which is ordinary line-of-sight targeting already represented by Line of Sight true.

fabricate::created_object_or_structure.issue: The spell creates objects from raw materials with Large/Medium size caps, cube containment rules, material-specific constraints, creature/magic-item exclusions, and tool proficiency gates; runtime does not type any of this creation logic.
fabricate::created_object_or_structure.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object fabrication fields for created object size/volume, material constraints, exclusions, and tool proficiency requirements.

find-greater-steed::choice_or_mode.issue: The spirit's form, Celestial/Fey/Fiend type, and language are all caster choices; runtime stores none of them as typed options.
find-greater-steed::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon choice fields for formOptions, creature type override options, Intelligence floor, and language choice.

find-greater-steed::target_filter_or_eli.issue: The mount appears in an unoccupied space within range, but runtime targets generic creatures and lacks placement-space eligibility.
find-greater-steed::target_filter_or_eli.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon placement fields for unoccupied space within range.
find-greater-steed::target_filter_or_eli.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon placement data and consider validTargets point/unoccupied_space rather than creatures.

find-greater-steed::sustain_or_recast_ac.issue: The mount can be dismissed temporarily as an action, released permanently as an action, and recast to re-summon the bonded mount with restored HP and removed conditions; runtime lacks these lifecycle actions.
find-greater-steed::sustain_or_recast_ac.recommendedTemplateChange: Add bonded summon lifecycle fields for dismiss, release, recast restore, and temporary/permanent disappearance.

find-greater-steed::message_or_communica.issue: The mount gains a language if needed and has 1-mile telepathy with the caster; runtime lacks typed language and telepathy fields.
find-greater-steed::message_or_communica.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned creature language and telepathy range fields.

find-greater-steed::summon_or_controlled.issue: The spell creates a bonded controllable mount with form options, stat-block references, type overrides, combat control, telepathy, spell-sharing, disappearance/recast lifecycle, one-mount bond limit, and carried-object drop behavior; runtime is only a generic utility placeholder.
find-greater-steed::summon_or_controlled.recommendedTemplateChange: Add bonded mount summon fields covering form, stats, control, spell sharing, lifecycle, bond limit, and equipment handling.

find-greater-steed::social_or_knowledge_.issue: The one-bond limit across Find Greater Steed and Find Steed is a persistent relationship constraint, not currently typed.
find-greater-steed::social_or_knowledge_.recommendedTemplateChange: Add bonded summon exclusivity fields across spell families.

find-greater-steed::object_stats_or_dama.issue: The mount disappears at 0 HP, recast restores all HP and removes conditions, and disappearing leaves behind worn/carried objects; runtime lacks typed HP/lifecycle/equipment handling.
find-greater-steed::object_stats_or_dama.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime mountLifecycle and equipmentDrop data.

fire-shield::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster chooses warm shield or chill shield, which links resistance type and retaliation damage type; runtime now has both types present but not a linked mode choice.
fire-shield::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked mode fields for warm/chill shield resistance and retaliation damage.
fire-shield::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime modeChoice data linking warm to Cold resistance/Fire retaliation and chill to Fire resistance/Cold retaliation.

fire-shield::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The retaliation triggers when a creature within 5 feet hits the caster with a melee attack roll; runtime damage now uses on_attack_hit and describes the melee/5-foot condition.
fire-shield::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No attack/save modifier field required for this pass; a future trigger filter can make the 5-foot melee condition first-class.
fire-shield::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by changing the DAMAGE trigger to on_attack_hit and preserving the melee/5-foot condition in description.

fire-shield::vision_light_sound.issue: The Bright Light and Dim Light radii are now represented by a UTILITY light effect.
fire-shield::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No new light field required for this pass.
fire-shield::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding a light utility effect with brightRadius 10 and dimRadius 10.

fire-shield::damage_reduction_or_prevent.issue: Warm shield grants Cold resistance and chill shield grants Fire resistance; runtime now has a DEFENSIVE resistance effect.
fire-shield::damage_reduction_or_prevent.recommendedTemplateChange: No new defensive field required for this pass; linked mode choice remains open under choice_or_mode.
fire-shield::damage_reduction_or_prevent.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding a DEFENSIVE resistance effect for Cold/Fire.

fire-shield::environmental_change.issue: The detector matched elemental damage type names, but the spell affects the caster and attackers rather than changing the environment.
fire-shield::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under light, defensive resistance, retaliation damage, and mode choice fields.
